Never miss a deal

Here are 3 ways to hear about all our sales and offers.

Message/data rates may apply. Terms at www.audible.com/terms. Privacy at www.audible.com/privacy. **Update email settings at www.audible.com/account/email-notifications.

FAQ

How can I find out when Audible is having a sale?

We’ve got a few ways to keep you in the know: Visit the notifications page to sign up for sales and offers emails. You can also sign up for Daily Deals emails so you never miss a deal. Of course, you can always visit the Audible Deals page.

How often does Audible have a sale?

Every day. A new title is deeply discounted daily in the Audible Daily Deal. Also, every month the Monthly Deals sale offers hundreds of titles discounted up to 85% off. And several times a month, special sales offer a wide selection of fantastic offers you won't find anywhere else.

Do Audible Premium Plus members get additional deals?

Audible Premium Plus members get access to Monthly Deals, and a bigger selection to shop in our other sales. Find out more and join Premium Plus.

Can I be notified when a specific title goes on sale?

Sign in and add the title to your Wish List. We’ll let you know any time a title in your Wish List goes on sale.
